---
title: "Reference"
---

## Model fitting

- `spectral_unmix()`
- `summary()`
- `print()`

## Accessors

- `basis()`
- `coef()`
- `fitted()`
- `predict()`
- `residuals()`

## Cube helpers

- `cube_to_matrix()`
- `matrix_to_cube()`
- `component_map()`
- `component_spectrum()`
- `component_reconstruction()`

## Visualization

- `plot()`
- `plot_reconstruction()`

## Examples

- `simulate_ifu_cube()`
- `demo_ifu_unmix()`
